task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR main dashboard, schedule view, or search page is visible, indicating successful authentication with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eChart, demographic record, or patient summary for 'Maria Santos' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Past Medical History (PMHx) or Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP) section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Past Medical History (PMHx) or Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP) editing window or input section is actively open.

task_completion.description: Verify the first medical history entry was added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Cholecystectomy 2018' is visible in the PMHx input field, search result selection, or the pending list of medical history items.

task_completion.description: Verify the second medical history entry was added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Pneumonia hospitalization 2020' is visible in the PMHx input field, search result selection, or the pending list of medical history items.

task_completion.description: Verify both entries were saved and persist in the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both 'Cholecystectomy 2018' and 'Pneumonia hospitalization 2020' are clearly visible in the saved PMHx/CPP summary section of Maria Santos's eChart, indicating the save action was successful.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the Oscar EMR web interface via a web browser, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or direct database SQL inserts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine Oscar EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Oscar EMR interface (URL should be http://localhost:8080/oscar/...), not a local text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the modifications were made to the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The medical history entries were added specifically to the profile of Maria Santos, and the patient name is visible on the screen where the edits are saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. CRITICAL NOTE: The task description states the patient's DOB is 1985-07-22, but the actual seeded database uses DOB 1994-04-27. Do not penalize the agent if the screen shows DOB 1994-04-27; accept it as the correct patient. Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN 1117. Required Entry 1: 'Cholecystectomy 2018'. Required Entry 2: 'Pneumonia hospitalization 2020'.
